feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Reforma Tributária, 2026 Valor total da NF
entry.content:
Depois de aplicar as notas de SD para RVABRA (3556404) durante os teste percebemos que o IBS e CBS estão somando ao total da NF, mas neste primeiro ano entende-se que o total da NF não seria alterado, concordam? em 2027 teoricamente CBS IBS alterariam os valores, mas em 2026 não?

Eu abri um ticket para produto para consulta e saber se a SAP vai liberar nota ou devemos achar um ponto e fazer Z o desenvolvimento?

Qual é o entendimento que tem sobre este ponto? Pra mim está bem confuso.

Amigos Editei o post apos conversa com meu amigo Bispo compartilhando screen:

entry.title: Configuration for secure act 2.0 section 109 roll over 401K pre-tax catch up o ROTH after-tax
entry.content: I"m testing Secure Act 2.0 and testing an ee that is aged 61 and is over 145,000 wage limit. His catch-up contribution should roll to Roth after-tax catch-up, but it"s still going into the 401K Pre-tax catch-up. How do I configure the system to roll over to Roth for Secure Act 2.0 requirements.

entry.title: Add BatchNumbers and BinAllocations to the picking list from services layer
entry.content:
I'm trying to generate a picking list with BatchNumbers and BinAllocations based on a inventory transfer request.

The picking list is created, but without that information. 

This is how I'm creating the picking list:

{
"Remarks": "Generado desde Service Layer",
"PickListsLines": [
{
"OrderEntry": 9580,
"OrderRowID": 0,
"ReleasedQuantity": 1,
"BaseObjectType": "1250000001",
"U_JgoxCaja": "1",

"BatchNumbers": [
{
"BatchNumber": "54",
"Quantity": 1
}
],
"DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
{
//"BaseLineNumber": 0,
"BinAbsEntry": 5767,
"Quantity": 1,
"AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
}
]
}
]
}

How can I generate the picking list with BatchNumbers and BinAllocations ?

entry.title: Long text option in ME31K
entry.content: How can we go for a long text option in ME31K? Please suggest the possibilities to have an option similar to sales order. While trying to edit the text, the page comes with a red line. Requesting your suggestions.

entry.title: While settlement of WBS in fiscal year 2024,get error "settle the balance from previous year in prev
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are in process to transfer the open balance in AUC to final Asset in fiscal year 2024. (12-2024)

To do this we run tcode CJ88 - for period 12 - 2024 with partial and full settlement processing types. But getting following error. There is no open balance in WBS prior to period 12-2024 but still getting error. 

Settle the balance from previous year in previous year first

Message No. KD625

WBS - P-CHN-08-100-42-10-CV

Requesting to please guide.

entry.title: I need to add one custom field in V_T001W view and also want to maintain that custom field in OX10.
entry.content:
Hello,

As per the attached image, I need to add one custom field at screen level in OX10 tcode. 

I have already append that field in T001W table. But when I am trying to add that column in V_T001W maintainance view and regenerating the TMG the above mentioned screen is getting changed totally. 

I just need to add that field rest of the things will be similar. How to do that?

entry.title: How to post a PO condition value to inventory, GR/IR and a separate G/L?
entry.content:
We wish to add tariff charges to our PO line items so have created a new condition type ZTF1 to do this. Some of its settings are:

Condition class - Discount

Calculation type - Percentage

Condition category - blank

Plus/minus - A (positive)

Accruals - blank

Upon MIGO, the additional tariff charge has been correctly accounted for.

1. DR Inventory - this is correct as we want to the tariff charge to be absorbed into the material cost.

2. CR GR/IR - this is correct as the tariff charge has to be paid to the supplier of the goods.

So far, so good.

However, Finance have created a new G/L account to track all the tariff charges purely for reporting purposes. How can I extend the current setup so that the new tariff G/L will also be populated?

entry.title: Change of item category from standard to different item category once PO is created
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Once a Purchase Order (PO) is created with the item category set as Standard, it is currently possible to update it to a different item category, provided there is no history.

 

We would like to know if it is possible to restrict changes to the item category in this scenario, or if a custom enhancement would be required.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Amount In LC- Goods Receipt (Asset Purchase Order (PO))
entry.content:
Hello, 

After performing a Goods Receipt (GR) with movement type 101 for a Purchase Order (PO) with account assignment category "A" (Asset), the Amount in Local Currency (LC) is not displayed in the PO History tab or in relevant tables like MSEG or EKBE.

As per my understanding, this is due to the "GR non-valuated" checkbox being selected for the asset account assignment. In such cases, the amount is only updated after the Invoice Receipt (IR) is posted via MIRO.

Before the IR is posted, is there any standard way to view or track the GR amount for such Asset POs?

Thanks in advance for your answers!

entry.title: Unable to Perform Return PO from Block Stock for External Refurbishment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,We are facing a business process challenge related to stock transfers and return processing in our organization structure, which comprises one plant and multiple storage locations (Slocs) managed via SAP MM and EWM.
Business Process Context:
1)All materials received from vendors or internal manufacturing are distributed to various Slocs within the same plant using STO (Stock Transport Order) processes.
2)Materials typically have a warranty period of at least 10 years.
3) If a material fails within the warranty period, it is returned either to the internal manufacturing unit if it is a minor repair and can be repaired within own capabilities or it is forwarded to the external vendor (Factory) for refurbishment or Replacement.
4) Such defective materials are moved to blocked stock using transaction MIGO (Transfer Posting to Blocked Stock) So that it is not issued inadvertently from any of  Slocs and to ensure safety of users

entry.title: express document "update was cancelled" error
entry.content: While doing PGI and reverse PGI we are getting this error. Can someone please tell how to fix this?

entry.title: RECN entries in SVT confirmed table
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to build a solution in SAP EHS - Substance volume Tracking (SVT), which can show confirmed qty data per sales export with sale order number and supplier name in an another customized transaction (copy of report  CBRC20). Standard SAP SVT functionality has limitation in showing detailed confirmed qty data. 

What we observed is, there is a table called CCRCT_SOLO which plays important role. It collects values from MSEG table and also collects RECN number (sequential record number) from SVT table CCRCT_SO.  Thus it is a link between SVT data and Material document data and the link is RECN number from SVT table.  We are struggling to find why CCRCT_SO table entries do not have RECN number available. Without RECN number we cannot proceed further.

Is it anything missing  that it is not filling any RECN number?

Note that in Sand Box  system  AEY- 400, we activated business function LOG_EHS_CI_2 and here we can see the RECN number in several CCRCT_SO entries (but not all).

  • Is RECN number display associated with activation of Business function LOG_EHS_CI_2.
  • Is there any settings that needs so that RECN number is available for table CCRCT_SO entries.           

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Payroll live check
entry.content: Hi Everyone, I have received a requirement to implement payroll live check, it would be great if you could provide me more information on this functionality and any additional information would greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Payroll live check
entry.content: Hi Everyone, I have received a requirement to implement payroll live check, it would be great if you could provide me more information on this functionality and any additional information would greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Error C 056 “Field overflow during price calculation” during goods receipt (MIGO)
entry.content:
We are encountering error C 056 - Field overflow during price calculation when posting a goods receipt in transaction MIGO in our SAP ECC system.

 

Field overflow during price calculation

 

Message no. C 056

 

Diagnosis

 

A price was calculated that was larger than the maximum value allowed. The stock value of

entry.title: Cayman (KY) calculation procedure
entry.content:
Hi All,

I created a new company code in the Cayman Islands,

and when I open an order for this company, an error occurs in FV60

"FF703 - Company code not assigned to country or country to calculation procedure"

There appears to be no SAP standard calculation procedure for the Cayman Islands. Should I build?

There are some articles in the community, but it seems that there is no conclusion

Thanks All !!

entry.title: "How to offset a credit note during the SEPA SDD ITALY payment document creation process?"
entry.content:
My client in Italy  wants to offset credit notes during the creation of SDD (bill of exchange) documents using transaction F110, even when the credit note is not linked to a specific invoice. How can this be done? Does anyone have an idea?" 

Thank in advance

Dan

entry.title: Database level audit requirements
entry.content:
Dear Team,


We have enabled database level auditing for our MSSQL database for INSERT, UPDATE & DELETE queries for all database users.


We are having following further requirements on the auditing part

  1. We need change log/history of all audit trails including old and new values.
  2. We want to activate individual table level database auditing.
  3. We are unable to read generated database audit files. How to read the data captured in these audit files.

Expecting your inputs to achieve the mentioned settings in audit policies.


Thanks,


SAP BASIS Team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ATC - How to Implement AUTHORITY-CHECK
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

     I have implemented ATC in my company and I need to configure AUTHORITY-CHECK. From what I have seen, there is no standard AUTHORITY-CHECK. Has anyone implemented ATC with AUTHORITY-CHECK? Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Impact of Changing Cost Center on Settlement Rule in IW32 After Order Release
entry.content: In transaction IW32, once the order has been released and a settlement rule has already been assigned, my question is: if I change the cost center in the “Location” – “Account Assignment” view, should this change be reflected in the settlement rule?
